channel.title: Guyana News on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Guyana News on The Guyana Brief

item.title: The Guyana Daily Brief — Sunday, April 12, 2026
item.description: GDF closes in on ASL crash site after 24 hours of brutal terrain, Kaieteur blows open the Wales GTE contract, a new hospital breaks ground in Bartica, and the opposition has drama of its own.

item.title: The Guyana Daily Brief — Saturday, April 11, 2026
item.description: Plane down in Region 8, US$761M oil quarter, Ali tells T&T to lock themselves in a room for 72 hours, and the Gas-to-Energy project delays again.
